relationships.description: Mali is emblematic of food insecurity

Sahel countries are vulnerable to food insecurity
Apprehending food systems is necessary to understand food insecurity
Understanding behavioral aspects is critical to understanding food insecurity
Agriculture is embedded in the social system
Adaptive behaviors are responses to challenges to food security

Represent mental models of food security

Food insecurity is the lack of food security
